title: APIGatewayService
description: A service published on the OTI-operated api.nyc.gov citywide API gateway (Microsoft Azure API Management). NET-NEW as a first-class resource: OTI RUNS the gateway (GeoClient, GeoSearch, and other agency APIs), but there is no machine-readable catalog OF the gateway's services or a self-service API for keys/subscriptions — access is subscription-key-gated (HTTP 401 'missing subscription key') and provisioned through a developer portal, not an API. This schema is the shape of one registered gateway service.

serviceId.description: Stable service/product identifier on the gateway (e.g. 'geoclient', 'geosearch').

category.description: Service category (e.g. Geospatial, Records, Payments, Notifications).

openapiUrl.description: Link to the service's OpenAPI/definition, if published.

authType.description: How the service is authenticated. api.nyc.gov uses Azure APIM subscription keys (Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key).

keyRequired.description: Whether a gateway subscription key is required to call the service.

portalUrl.description: Developer-portal page where a key/subscription is requested.
